package rulefixtures

// scenario for writer_write_byte_slice_of_string: `writer.Write([]byte(s))` instead of `io.WriteString(writer, s)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule695NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario695Negative(records []Rule695NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
